scripts.install:all: npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client start"
scripts.clean: rm -rf client/build client/node_modules/.cache && find . -name 'client/build' -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: echo '🧹 FORCE CLEANING ALL BUILDS...' && npm run clean && sleep 1 && echo '🏗️  Building React app...' && npm --prefix client run build && echo '✅ Build complete! Verifying...' && ls -la client/build/static/js/ 2>/dev/null | head -3 || echo '❌ Build directory missing!'
